description: Sector overlay for French accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Haute autoritÃ© de l'audit / statutory-audit oversight materials
TRACFIN AML/CFT framework for regulated professions

rules.title: Ordre registration or professional standing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for registration with the Ordre des experts-comptables, professional title, oath, or registration-table evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Professional standards, ethics, or independence evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for professional standards, code of ethics, independence, quality control, or engagement-letter evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Statutory audit or commissaire aux comptes oversight evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for statutory-audit, commissaire aux comptes, H2A, CNCC, or audit-report evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT client due-diligence route is evidenced where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for accounting-profession AML/CFT evidence, client identification, beneficial ownership, risk-based vigilance, or TRACFIN escalation.
